# Lumens America LLC

> New Jersey's PSE&G Certified Trade Ally for commercial LED lighting, HVAC, and solar upgrades. $0 upfront on qualifying projects. Statewide NJ coverage — all 21 counties.

Lumens America LLC is a full-service energy solutions contractor based in New Jersey. We specialize in designing, installing, and managing energy efficiency upgrades for commercial, industrial, and multifamily properties. As a PSE&G Certified Trade Ally and recipient of the PSE&G Fast Track Sprinter Award (2023), we help NJ property owners and facility managers access utility incentive programs that dramatically reduce or eliminate upfront project costs.

## Core Services

- **LED Lighting Retrofits** — Full fixture replacement and controls for commercial, industrial, and multifamily buildings
- **HVAC Upgrades** — Rooftop units, split systems, boilers, chillers, and ventilation
- **Solar Installation** — Commercial and multifamily rooftop solar
- **Free Energy Audits** — On-site facility assessment with program eligibility analysis, no cost or obligation

## PSE&G Incentive Programs We Manage

- **Direct Install** — PSE&G covers 100% of upfront costs for businesses under 300 kW demand or 40,000 therms/year. No out-of-pocket cost to customer.
- **Prescriptive Rebates** — Point-of-sale rebates for standard equipment. Any size business qualifies.
- **Engineered Solutions Tier 2** — Performance-based incentives for mid-size or custom projects.
- **Engineered Solutions (Full)** — PSE&G-funded audit and design for large C&I facilities; incentives based on verified 12-month savings.
- **Multifamily Program** — Rebates and OBR financing combined for residential buildings with 3+ units.
- **On-Bill Repayment (OBR)** — Financing repaid through utility bill; monthly payment is typically less than or equal to monthly energy savings.

## Service Area

All 21 New Jersey counties — statewide coverage:
Bergen, Essex, Hudson, Union, Passaic, Morris, Somerset, Hunterdon, Warren, Sussex, Middlesex, Monmouth, Mercer, Ocean, Atlantic, Burlington, Camden, Cape May, Cumberland, Gloucester, Salem.

## Key Facts

- 10+ years in business
- $0 upfront cost available on qualifying projects
- PSE&G Certified Trade Ally (active certification)
- PSE&G Fast Track Sprinter Award 2023 — most Fast Track kWh savings in lighting statewide
- Handles all PSE&G paperwork, applications, inspections, and approvals
